creator: jerry.jacobs@xor-gate.org
text:
Created attachment 230793
Screenshot of not visible table text

When the docs.freebsd.org the Dark mode is selected the table header <thead> <th> elements are almost white on white.

Issue seen on https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/design-44bsd/#overview-kernel-organization Table 1. See also attached screenshot.

Related to #260751 but probably not fixed because that issue is closed.
